title: 【2 Pack】Head Torch Rechargeable, Super Bright 230° Wide Beam Headtorch, 22 Hours Runtime, 7 Modes with Motion Sensor, 2000mAh Rechargeable Waterproof Lightweight Headlamp for Running,Camping,Hunting
features: 【Super Bright 230° Wide Beam Head Torches】Featuring high bright COB and LED light source, Sogdeco head torch offers a 230° wide-angle illumination and 1000 Lumens output for maximum brightness. When darkness settles in, count on our headlamp to cut through it, see the surroundings clearly without the need to move your head. The red light mode is particularly good for outdoor activities at night, as it does not disrupt a wildlife's night vision.

【Long-lasting & Rechargeable & Power Dispaly】Built-in 2000mAh rechargeable battery to provide a longer service life. When 3.5h fully charged, the head torch rechargeable can run for up to 12 hours under low spotlight, up to 6 hours under high floodlights on white brightness, and up to 22 hours on red light, almost all day long! Not only save the cost of replacing batteries but let you no worry that the battery will suddenly run out.

【Waterproof, Comfortable & Lightweight】The head lights for head with IP68 waterproof rating, are ready for any environment, so you don't need to worry if it rains or snows suddenly. It weighs only 0.11kg, comfortable, ergonomically, adjustable elastic headband fits kids or adults head size. Indoor and outdoor activities used in the waterproof headtorch no pressure, especially car repair, DIY work or emergency, etc.

【Long Press to Turn Off & 7 Light Modes With Motion Sensor】 The led head torch has 7 light modes of brightness to meet your daily needs. Press and hold the power button for 3 seconds in any mode to turn off the light directly, without having to cycle through, COB LED High, COB LED Low, XPE LED High, XPE LED Low, Red Light, Strobe Mode, Motion Sensor. In sensor mode, just wave your hand in front of the head torch to turn it on/off when your hands are in greasy conditions.

【Wide Application & Risk-Free Purchase】This Head Torch is the perfect gift choice for those who love the outdoors sports, long distance runners looking for comfortable fit. Suitable for nighttime walking, running, cycling, hiking, camping, climbing, fishing, hunting, barbecue, etc. What You Get: 2x LED Headlamp, 2x USB-C Cable, 2x User Manual, 4x Helmet Clips, 4x Hat Clips. All Sogdeco headlamps can return free within 30 days and offer you a 12-month warranty and a lifetime customer service.
